D

dealCard() - Method in class model.BJCards
Deals a card from the top of the deck.
dealer - Variable in class model.ModelManager
The dealer in the game.
deck - Variable in class model.BJCards
The list containing the deck of cards.
deck - Variable in class model.Player.Builder
 
deck - Variable in class model.Player
The deck of cards associated with the player.
deck() - Method in class model.Player.Builder
Sets the deck of cards associated with the player.
deleteSave(int) - Method in class controller.LoadGameController
Deletes the data for the specified save slot from the saves file.
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class model.BJCards.CardSuits
 
distributeCards() - Method in class model.ModelManager
Distributes two cards to each player and the dealer.
doubleDown(Player) - Method in class model.ModelManager
Doubles down a player's bet.
